systems.system_notes: Tibial intramedullary nailing platform within the TRIGEN family for tibial shaft and periarticular fracture fixation.

trays.tray_notes: Official Smith+Nephew materials support the TRIGEN tibial nail platform with dedicated operative instrumentation.

components.component_notes: Official product materials describe the TRIGEN tibial nail platform for tibial fracture fixation.
The TRIGEN tibial nail construct includes proximal and distal locking fixation options.
The TRIGEN tibial nail platform includes end-cap compatibility within the nail construct.

unresolved_items.raw_text: The public TRIGEN tibial pages define the nail platform and fixation family but do not expose a public implant code table in this pass.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper operative-technique or catalogue pass is required for product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
